ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta coefficient indicating volatility compared to the market */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total volume of stocks traded */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock data was updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change compared to the previous day */,
  "change_from_open" REAL /* Percentage change from the opening price */,
  "gap" REAL /* Percentage gap from the previous closing price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of stocks traded on that day */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "ma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moving average record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the moving average (in days) */,
  "sma_value" REAL /* Calculated simple moving average for that period */,
  "ema_value" REAL /* Exponential moving average value */,
  "wma_value" REAL /* Weighted moving average value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the moving average record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moving_averages_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highs_lows" (
  "hl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high/low record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "high" REAL /* 52-week high price */,
  "low" REAL /* 52-week low price */,
  "52_week_high_date" TEXT /* Date of the 52-week high */,
  "52_week_low_date" TEXT /* Date of the 52-week low */,
  "10_day_high" REAL /* 10-day high price */,
  "10_day_low" REAL /* 10-day low price */,
  "10_day_high_date" TEXT /* Date of the 10-day high */,
  "10_day_low_date" TEXT /* Date of the 10-day low */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highs_lows_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relative_strength_index" (
  "rsi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSI record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the RSI value */,
  "rsi_value" REAL /* Calculated RSI value for the stock */,
  "rsi_14" REAL /* 14-day RSI value */,
  "rsi_7" REAL /* 7-day RSI value */,
  "rsi_21" REAL /* 21-day RSI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relative_strength_index_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
